# jaeger

## Feature Gates

This component has the following feature gates:

| Feature Gate | Stage | Description | From Version | To Version | Reference |
| ------------ | ----- | ----------- | ------------ | ---------- | --------- |
| `receiver.jaeger.DisableRemoteSampling` | stable | When enabled, the Jaeger Receiver will fail to start when it is configured with remote_sampling config. When disabled, the receiver will start and the remote_sampling config will be no-op. | v0.84.0 | v0.152.0 | [Link](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector-contrib/pull/24186) |

For more information about feature gates, see the [Feature Gates](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector/blob/main/featuregate/README.md) documentation.
